prompt: Storyboard frame 3, vertical 9:16, end-card style still from Knock'em All. The cross-section has sealed back into a clean pastel #8ED4FF platform, confetti in #D91A1A red and #6B15E8 purple bursts across the frame, level progress bar UI at top shows 100% complete. Large bold white text overlay: 'Tap to Play' with a tapping finger icon. No human character on screen.
